settings.targetCities: Miami FL, Austin TX, Dallas TX, Phoenix AZ, Los Angeles CA
settings.invoiceInstructions: After the prospect verbally agrees, create a client-specific Deel contract or external invoice for $499/mo. Tell the client: I will send the Deel invoice now; once it is paid, I start the AI receptionist build.

checklist.text: Setup Deel or Payoneer to receive USD in Bangladesh.
Build a simple 1-page offer: AI Receptionist for Med Spas.
Send 50 IG DMs or emails to US clinics during BD daytime.
Conduct 5 Zoom discovery calls during the BD night shift.
Pre-sell 3 clinics at $499/mo and collect invoice payment.
Create Vapi.ai and GoHighLevel accounts after payment.
Build call-forwarding workflow from GHL to Vapi.
Deploy first 3 clients and monitor transcriptions.

sprint.text: Commit to med spas only for the first 7 days.
Build 100 med spa prospects: 20 each from Miami, Austin, Dallas, Phoenix, and Los Angeles.
Send 20 personalized messages per day using the missed-call angle.
Book at least 3 demo calls using the Calendly link.
Run every call with the ROI calculator and close into a Deel invoice.
After payment, collect onboarding info and build only that paid client.
Get one proof asset: testimonial, screenshot, or AI-booked appointment result.
